description: The Bachelor of Music; Major Performance (Piano) program provides comprehensive training in the practical and theoretical elements of music. Throughout the program, students receive individual instruction and participate in large and small ensembles. The Bachelor of Music (B.Mus.) - Major Performance (Piano) program requires 91 credits (plus 34 credits for the Foundation requirement for out-of-province students). Special Requirements Continuation in the program requires a minimum grade of B- in practical instruction/exams and ensembles.
